---
title: Basics of SIR Models
format:
    html:
        page-layout: full
metadata-files:
  - metadata/matthewferrari.yml
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vT3MB9_CCsFK0uRA5_SZdQfPcpQ1ZTr8JvxORrwJ6u_0Vo42IMFnxEso5uNXdzd0g/pubembed?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000" frameborder="0" width="1023" height="606" allowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true"></iframe>
```

[Download slides as PDF](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1ewcBrDokNNYQ4KNP1QgcAjlo_iebV_1z/export/pdf){target="_blank"}
